_howto: Add new items to the TOP of the list. 'date' is YYYY-MM-DD, 'text' is a one/two-sentence summary, 'url' is the link to the specific LinkedIn post (open the post, click the three dots, 'Copy link to post'). The page shows the newest 4.

items.text: New personal website is live — with publication data that now updates itself weekly.
Led AI governance sessions for 70 policymakers from 22 African nations at the OpenSchool Initiative.
Invited talk at the US Holocaust Memorial Museum, Washington DC, on the SpaceTimeNarratives testimony pipeline.
